title: Cursed Fate: Cursed Tweaks (New Boss Fights!)
description: This is an Add-On for the Minecraft mod Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate Mod! This mod is solely an extension for the original mod by ImNotHURAGAN and does not work independently.
body:
This is an Add-On for the Minecraft mod Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate Mod!!. This mod is solely an extension for the orginal mod by ImNotHURAGAN and does not work independently. 

Discord: https://discord.gg/9ckujcx75

**What This Mod Offers** 


**Whole New Boss Fight Event!**

/startevent Ryomen_Sukuna/Satoru_Gojo/Yuji_Itadori
/stopevent

/gamerule bosses true
![Boss Fight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1d568d65233554e909b9924ddf13d00dd5fc9d1.png)

New Potion Effect "Infinite CE"

![Infinite CE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d47da7ba8ac272f6517a570478deb7f8cc026d77.png)
  While the effect is active Player is Subjected to an Abundant pool of Cursed Energy, Maximum Techniques are prohibited for the duration(Toggled).

      /gamerule disableMaximumOutput false

New Potion Effect "Stomach Bug"

![Stomach Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/016a4ee77e8317609e95117ecb05c99ae025f3e0.png)
  While the effect is active Player is Given Saturation For 2 Minutes Followed By Debuffs Upon Expiration!  

New Mob Drops (Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna)
Jujutsu Scroll
Cursed Corpse
Bug Corpse(Silver Fish)



New Cursed Corpse Item!

![Corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6224c78c5200b708227c82ff20263866264211bc.png)

    Dropped by the Strongest  (Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna)

       Upon Consumption Player is Given the Status Effect "Infinite CE"  and is Subjected to an Abundant pool of Cursed Energy, Maximum Techniques are prohibited for the duration. Over Consumption can be Lethal!



New Jujutsu Scroll Item!

![Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/607ea632ec6a2bc3377fee22b5de31343d457edc.png)

 Dropped by the Strongest  (Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna)

  Uppon use Grants RCT, Binding Vow and Player Gets Promoted to Special Grade

New Bug Corpse Item!

![Bug Corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ec156f39b6be1213b2c2de1a7e1d092b6358a78.png)

 Dropped by Silver Fish

  Used To Craft Stomach Bug!

New Stomach Bug Consumable!

![Craft Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9d80c92b5e82337de143a3a7b4dd9bc7020d2c.png)

 Crafted By Surounding A Bug Corpse With Four Bone Meal!

  Upon Use Grants The Effect "Stomach Bug"

New Advancement "Jujutsu Master"

![Jujutsu Master](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980c72f67b056e8434c00d45353c2560f94f4015.png)

  Obtained By Using a Jujutsu Scroll!

New Advancement "The Strongest"

![Strongest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e0b8657f2930240109b57b7c6b4e784fc49e8a2.png)

  Obtained by defeating either of the Strongest (Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna)



New Advancement "Forbidden Recipe"

![Forbidden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9195f070f0d5b88c45436357109eab9e8f3975c6.png)

  Obtained by Crafting A Special Grade Elixir of Cursed Energy



New Advancement "Bugs!"

![Bugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b0f76530a1e061227bbf9b7e3683b7d5d84b8f.png)

  Obtained by Crafting A Stomach Bug!

New Grade Based Consumable "Elixir of Cursed Energy, Grade 4 - Special Grade"

Grade 4 - Grade 3

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6de3e3a6e173f387849029254f49d25394dfd715.png)

Grade 3 - Grade 2

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c430b62f3c5fb41bca52bc3029a14852a88cecc1.png)

Grade 2 - Grade 1

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839a7d9e7c1e62a64e0fdad3d0782c4f0eff47d9.png)

Grade 1 - Special Grade

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41addb5874a06e2c2276457cb64c147611ce1ecb.png)

New Innate Book Item!

 ![Innate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fe09b6b37e6bc1f8a86346833ae5727370f949c.png)

New Technique Selection Menu

![Tech](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b86b5436151cfea99f5410c0898e5c67e55916d.png)

Compatible With Projection Sorcery, Mythical Beast Amber, Wither Rose, Multiverse And Reze!!


New Creative Only Item!

    Upon Use Maxes All Stats!!


New Creative Only Item!

    Upon Use Recovers All Stats!!




New Gamerule "CursedDropes"

Determines if Cursed Fate Consumables Should be Dropped!




New Gamerule "Disable MaximumOutput"

Determines if Infinite CE Effect Disables MaximumOutput/Chant!




New Gamerule "Jujutsu Scroll Drop"

Determines if Jujutsu Scroll Can be Obtained Via Entity Dropes!




New Gamerule "Technique Selection"

Determines If Techniques Can Be Selected Through Innate Book!




New Villager Trade "Jujutsu Scroll" (Librarian[Expert])

       32 Emeralds + 1 Cursed Corpse = Jujutsu Scroll 

       

New Villager Trade "Grade 4 Elixir of Cursed Energy" (Cleric[Novice])

       17 Emeralds = Grade 4 Elixir of Cursed Energy


![Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/490044fd646bfdc6beaa56a8220a54d4ed75141c.png)
